chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1734 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objection. 2. For orders on CMA No.8532/24 (151 CPC) 3. For hearing of CMA No. 6658/24 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 12.09.2025 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners does not press the instant petition. Therefore, the instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
